result.summary: Found 4 issues: one major layout truncation issue, one major navigation clipping issue, and two minor visual inconsistencies.

issues.description: Game cards in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are being clipped/cut off on the right side. The third column shows partial game titles like 'MAGNI...' and 'MUNC...' and 'MI...' indicating the grid overflows the viewport without proper containment or padding.
issues.suggestion: Apply overflow:hidden or a proper responsive grid layout that accounts for the viewport width, or reduce the number of columns to fit within the screen without truncation.

issues.description: The horizontal navigation bar at the top is clipping the 'Hot Ga...' tab — it is visibly cut off on the right edge, indicating the scrollable row is not signaling clearly that more items exist.
issues.suggestion: Add a fade gradient on the right edge of the navigation to visually indicate more items are scrollable, or implement a proper horizontal scroll indicator.

issues.description: The 'Top Played New Games' section also has the third column of game thumbnails cut off on the right side (e.g., 'HYPERO...' and 'DAR WATE...'), consistent with the same overflow issue affecting the entire page grid layout.
issues.suggestion: Fix the global grid/column layout to either use a 2-column grid for mobile or properly scroll with visible indicators for additional columns.

issues.description: The jackpot dollar amount '$6,264.35' is displayed over the 'Cop The Lot' game card in the bottom-left area of the exclusive games grid, but no similar indicator is shown consistently across all jackpot-eligible games, creating visual inconsistency.
issues.suggestion: Apply jackpot amount overlays consistently to all jackpot-eligible games or remove them for a uniform card design.
